mechanism_narrative: Sustained declines in the federal funds rate reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 6.0%, labor market tightness accelerates wage growth and consumer spending, driving positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day returns are negative or flat when UNRATE crosses below 6.0% in more than 50% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production growth combined with rising housing starts signals robust aggregate demand outpacing supply constraints, leading to higher corporate profit margins and positive forward equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive 20-day returns in at least 60% of out-of-sample periods, or the interaction term in a multivariate regression shows insignificant coefficients.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer prices force the Federal Reserve to maintain restrictive policy, which increases discount rates and compresses equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns remain positive when CPIAUCSL accelerates above the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent month-over-month growth in housing starts reflects sustained consumer confidence and credit availability, which translates into positive S&P 500 returns over a one-week horizon.
failure_condition: The rolling correlation between HOUST momentum and 5-day SPX returns drops below 0.1 over a 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: When nonfarm payrolls exceed 150,000 for three consecutive months, it confirms a self-sustaining economic expansion that lifts equity valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day forward returns are negative in more than 55% of instances following the payroll threshold breach.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real estate financing activity coupled with stable short-term interest rates indicates healthy credit demand without tightening financial conditions, supporting positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields a negative predictive IC over any 3-year rolling window, or forward returns are not significantly different from zero.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of supply chain stress, industrial production growth decelerates while inflation accelerates, creating stagflationary pressures that depress equity valuations over the next month.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO growth rate falls below 0.5% while CPIAUCSL rises > 0.3%
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive when industrial output slows and consumer prices accelerate simultaneously.
